productDisplayName: Rockport Men Sc Slip On Brown Casual Shoes
description: Slip into laidback comfort with these Vicuna shoes. Coming from rockport, these shoes feature uppers crafted from nubuck with stitch detailing for extra style. Engineered with adidas AdiPRENE technology, this shoe offers all-day cushioning comfort making it a great buy. Upper Nubuck upper with mesh inserts for added strength, durability and breathability Padded tongue and collar to protect from excessive rubbing and prevent blistering Elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for easy insertion and removal of the feet Waterproof Hydro-shield lining for greater comfort and a dry feel Brand logo embedded on the side Midsole Highly shock-absorbent adiPRENE technology infused cushioning protects the heel on impact for all day cushioned comfort Polyurethane (PU) Midsole Offers durability for long-term wear & shock absorbent-cushioning to help reduce foot fatigue Outsole Rubber outsole delivers shock absorption thereby reducing foot fatigue Circular lugs and mutli-directional lugs on the periphery of the shoes for superior grip Flex grooves provide flexibility in foot movement Shoe care Use a leather brush to dust off the dirt Use a leather shoe polish to make the shoes shine Do not store in direct sunlight
